topic: NYC mayoral race - Mamdani CP meta-prediction
summary: Mamdani is Dem nominee leading by 18pts in 4-way FPTP general. CP likely around 90-94%.
content:
Key facts from Wikipedia (verified):
- Mamdani won Dem primary June 24, 2025 (56.4% final round RCV vs Cuomo 43.6%)
- General election Nov 4, 2025 (FPTP): Mamdani (D), Cuomo (I), Adams (I), Sliwa (R)
- RCP average Sept 2025: Mamdani 44%, Cuomo 24.5%, Sliwa 14.3%, Adams 9.5% → +19.5 lead
- DDHQ average: Mamdani 42.6%, Cuomo 25%, Sliwa 13.9%, Adams 9.8% → +17.6 lead
- Head-to-head: Mamdani beats Cuomo ~48-44%; Mamdani beats Adams ~51-30%
- Anti-Mamdani consolidation failed: Walden dropped out Sept 2, Adams refused Sept 5
- 133 forecasters on underlying question
- Prior meta-question (post 39229): CP > 90% on Aug 29 (likely resolved YES)
